message:
fix(palette): sync viewport height between Update and View

The viewport Height was calculated differently in Update() vs View():
- Update: listHeight (m.height - 14)
- View: listBoxHeight - 2 (m.height - 16)

This 2-line difference caused ensureCursorVisible() to use a taller
viewport than what's actually rendered, potentially cutting off the
cursor at the bottom of the visible area.

Now both use the same calculation (m.height - 14 - 2 = m.height - 16).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
